title: Friday Sermon 29 May 1998
description:
Verily Allah commands you to deliver the trusts to those best fitted to discharge them, and that when you judge between people you judge with justice. And surely excellent is that with which Allah admonishes you! Allah is All-Hearing All-Seeing.

('The Holy Quran'.  al-Nisa [The Women]: 59).

This verse has a deep impact upon the incidents taking place in the subcontinent in view of the recent atomic blasts carried out by India and then by Pakistan and the situation resulting from it and the solution to these problems is also present in it.

All the suspecting powers of the world know about the capability of both Pakistan and India to create atomic bombs or about the nuclear arsenal they have amassed but now they are lying and being deceptive in their statements.  It appears to be a conspiracy only against Pakistan but in reality it is also a conspiracy against India.  It is a conspiracy against the people of Pakistan and India and an attempt to render both these countries powerless for good and its machinations would be unfolded by future events and then you would begin to see it.  


The text http://www.alislam.org/urdu/sermon/FST19980529-UR.pdf
